# Campaign Brief

Product: Workflow governance platform
Market: Mid-market SaaS operations teams
Locale: US
Industries: Software, Professional services
Job titles: VP Operations, Director of Business Systems
Job functions: Operations, Information Technology
Seniorities: Director, VP
Pains: approval workflows are manual
Gains: faster process visibility
Objections: implementation burden
Triggers: annual planning cycle
Campaign goal: qualified meetings
Preferred channels: linkedin-ads, google-ads-youtube
